items.title: We've set the default effort level for Opus 4.7 to xhigh in Claude Code. You can use /effort to…
items.content: We've set the default effort level for Opus 4.7 to xhigh in Claude Code. You can use /effort to adjust this. Excited for you to try Claude Code with Opus 4.7 and let us know your feedback!
items.summary: We've set the default effort level for Opus 4.7 to xhigh in Claude Code. You can use /effort to adjust this. Excited for you to try Claude Code with Opus 4.7 and let us know your feedback!

items.title: 3. Tell the model how to verify its changes. Put your testing workflow in your claude.md, or ad…
items.content: 3. Tell the model how to verify its changes. Put your testing workflow in your claude.md, or add a /verify-app skill. Opus 4.7 is better at verifying it's work, and it's helpful to share any local dev tips that are hard to discover.

items.title: Over the past few weeks, I’ve become a daily user of Claude Code on desktop. It’s the best way…
items.content: Over the past few weeks, I’ve become a daily user of Claude Code on desktop. It’s the best way to kick off and manage multiple CC sessions across local and cloud in one place. You can also see git status, pin active sessions, and drag and drop layout to view multiple sessions at the same time! Let us know what you think :)
